channel.title: Vintage Story Mod DB - Latest Updates
channel.description: Newest mod releases and updates from the Vintage Story Mod DB

item.title: Player Model lib
item.description: Library for adding new player races

item.title: Vulkan's Combat Overhaul Patches
item.description: Tweaks and Patches for some less popular features of Combat Overhaul

item.title: Meliora Meadows Adjustments
item.description: Adjusts A LOT of mods, applying Aldi's Classes trait restrictions and disabling some jsons.

item.title: ecomachina x wildcraft
item.description: makes most trees from wildcrafttrees work with ecomachina

item.title: C&N Claims
item.description: Land protection mod.

item.title: The Crown & The Coalition Server Tweaks
item.description: Server tweaks for The Crown & The Coalition.

item.title: Roleplay Character Creator
item.description: Classic choose-your-own-adventure style character creator for Vintage Story. Server authored!

item.title: Weapon Pack Alpha - Rebalanced
item.description: Ever used this legendary mod and thought some things were too OP or weak? this should fix that.

item.title: Vintage Opossum
item.description: Adds a Possum Playermodel

item.title: TAROT CARDS
item.description: Adds a pickable tarot card on character creation

item.title: BLACK HORN
item.description: Adds different color horns, charlotte made the original shapes, just color changed

item.title: Additional Hair Colors
item.description: Gives the player a lot more options for hair colors, should work with modded races.

item.title: Murlok Vintage Server Patch
item.description: Collection of tweaks for the Murlok server and playthrough.

item.title: Animalica - Body Tools & Classes
item.description: Adds wearable claws, fangs, body tools, and animal classes for Fox, Wolf, and Hyena for now

item.title: Animalica Core
item.description: Core mod for playable animals. Does nothing on it's own

item.title: Deep Storage Chest (Hot Guy Edition)
item.description: Based off of Lancer827's Deep Storage Mod. Changes the crafting recipe.

item.title: Bixo
item.description: Creatures for Maltiez's Player Model Lib!

item.title: Seasoned Firewood (Redux)
item.description: A faithful continuation of the original mod by Fearadach.

item.title: Cozy Pierzynas
item.description: Adds new uses for feathers. Pillows and duvets in many colors.

item.title: Movable Rapid Water
item.description: Allows you to pick up rapid water source blocks with a bucket.

item.title: Archipelago Client
item.description: A simple integration of Vintage Story with Archipelago Multiworld Randomizer.

item.title: Extreme Weathers
item.description: Greatly increases the threat the elements pose, blizzards, hurricanes, monsoons. Get ready!

item.title: WOO Presents: Fantasy Crops
item.description: Fantasy Crops catered to play on the Whispers of Oldwood, available for all.

item.title: Crucible Unlock
item.description: Very simple. Unlocks the slots in the crucible for any item.

item.title: DesertWearPatch
item.description: Patches in recipes for DesertWear.

item.title: WOO³
item.description: A modpack that contains custom content and server tweaks for the Whispers of Oldwood season 3.

item.title: WeatherStory
item.description: static barometric orographic directional wind/precipitation/fire sim via bands, seasons, hemispheres

item.title: Chunk Loader
item.description: Allows players to keep chunks active when far away via customizable chat commands.

item.title: Quivers and Sheaths Fork
item.description: 1.22 Fork

item.title: Overhaul lib legacy compatibility
item.description: Compat for firearms, crossbows, combatoverhaul
